nasb.text: Now, behold, I know that you will surely be king, and that the kingdom of Israel will be established in your hand.

esv.text: And now, behold, I know that you shall surely be king, and that the kingdom of Israel shall be established in your hand.

cnv.text: 現在我知道你必要作王，以色列的王國必在你手裡堅立起來。

ccb.text: 我知道你必做王，以色列国必在你手中得到坚固。
